gestures.mdmPrompt: The tutor waves both hands enthusiastically while welcoming students and introducing the topic of addition.
The tutor points to the number line while explaining the addition of 1 plus 1 with apple images.
The tutor holds up fingers on both hands while encouraging students to count aloud with them.
The tutor opens their left hand while asking the question about the toys, inviting students to respond.
The tutor raises both hands with thumbs up, emphasizing the importance of practicing addition and celebrating success.
